display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
WHEN does it act
relative to the event?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PREVENTIVE
approval gate, system block, SoD
evidence: control operating + event did NOT occur

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DETECTIVE
reconciliation, exception report, monitoring alert
evidence: the alert population + each disposition

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CORRECTIVE
remediation, claw-back, re-process
evidence: remediation record tied to the detection

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Now rate BOTH:
design effectiveness (built to work?)
AND operating effectiveness (worked over the period?)
